title: isatis latisiliqua subsp. subradiata
intro: Isatis latisiliqua subsp. subradiata, also known as Yellow Isatis or Ban Tian Li, is a plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Isatis latisiliqua subsp. subradiata include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, capsules, and tinctures, as well as being incorporated into traditional Chinese medicinal formulas to support overall well-being.
